\tzpentry{ID3504}{Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3504 introduces Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ T^{00}_{\rm EM} \simeq \mathcal{E}_{\rm EM},\qquad T^{0i}_{\rm EM}\simeq \frac{1}{c}S^i_{\rm EM},\qquad T^{ij}_{\rm EM}=\sigma^{ij}. \]
